parameters.content: Sprint 15 - imported via POST /api/n8n/workflows/import/patient-intake, then triggered via POST /api/n8n/workflows/patient-intake/trigger, which calls this workflow's Webhook node. Still placeholder business logic (no downstream nodes) - only the trigger mechanism is real.

meta.name: Patient Intake
meta.description: Placeholder for a future patient intake workflow. Trigger mechanism (webhook) is real; no business logic implemented.
